title: End Blocker
description: Easily enable / disable end portals on your server
body:
# Issues & Suggestions

Visit our [Discord](https://discord.gg/simplestudio) for any issues or suggestions!

# Summary
Easy block players from going into end portals / teleporting to the end

# Features
- Disable or Enable end portals with 1 command

# Commands
- /endblocker enable - Lock players from the end world
- /endblocker disable - Allow players into the end world
- /endblocker reload - Reload config


# Permissions:
- endblocker.admin - Access to enable|disable|reload
- endblocker.bypass - Bypass the end block

# Config:

```
# ENDBLOCKER CONFIGURATION | BY JAMPLIFIER
# SUPPORT http://discord.gg/simplestudio

END-WORLD: world_the_end
END-BLOCKED: true
```
